title: Upgrading only one member of my team to PRO, keeping al other as Standard
excerpt:
Is there a way, where I can have only 1 member of my team as a PRO plan and all the teams as standard? 
I want to have some boards as private, and create more flexible automations, but I would rather not upgrade my hole …

posts.author: Tuko (Luis Alberto Ruiz)
posts.cookedHtml:
Is there a way, where I can have only 1 member of my team as a PRO plan and all the teams as standard?

I want to have some boards as private, and create more flexible automations, but I would rather not upgrade my hole team, when they will be doing the same work as before.

Please notify me if it’s possible.

posts.author: Clover_Gal (Desiree McCarthy | monday.com Ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml: The plans are a minimum of 5 users, how many do you have on your basic account?

posts.author: Tuko (Luis Alberto Ruiz)
posts.cookedHtml: I have 7 users in my team. All of them are in the standard account. I would like to be the Pro plan, but it looks like I have to upgrade them all. Please let me know if there’s a way to solve this.

posts.author: Clover_Gal (Desiree McCarthy | monday.com Ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml: I don’t believe that’s an option. Maybe chat with support?
